trackinfo.title: Fort Worth

trackinfo.title: Earthfest 2023
trackinfo.lyrics: i saw you at the concert where i played i was on the stage you look away trying to avoid me trying to pretend i don't exist you walked away when i played turning your face i never meant to hurt  devout  loving  warm you, you, you're gone it's all my, it's all my fault

trackinfo.title: Crow

(you've changed!) (or maybe i was blind) (to your ways, you've changed your ways) (yours ways!)

trackinfo.title: Look! It's Growing!

trackinfo.title: Why Won't You Love?

Dead Butterflies.title: heat death of the universe
Dead Butterflies.about: our most personal and passionate project to date.
Dead Butterflies.credits:
released June 6, 2025
written and recorded from september 2024 to may 2025
mixed and mastered by santiago lara
cover art by the one and only @kevtua
dead butterflies is:
micah
josue
johnny
kai
stella
yair
tyler
thank you <3

trackinfo.title: ramona's theme
trackinfo.credits: from heat death of the universe, released June 6, 2025

trackinfo.title: butterfly eyes
trackinfo.lyrics: Butterfly eyes The love in my chest might die Holding on to lies I'd like to say I'm fine But I know, I just lie But I know, I just lie The stars slam through my chest Begging you to stay awake "Please just let go" So I let go. Raise my arms! (To the crumbling sky) Stars slam through my chest!
trackinfo.credits: from heat death of the universe, released June 6, 2025

trackinfo.title: beneath the surface
trackinfo.lyrics: We remain ourselves In a new facade I don't know how I just know we're... Through my eyes! If you saw yourself through my eyes (Through my eyes!) If you saw yourself through my eyes (You would love you too!)
trackinfo.credits: from heat death of the universe, released June 6, 2025

trackinfo.title: midnight
trackinfo.lyrics: Stars strung through our (wrist!) Through the midnight (bliss!) I won't feel my (heart!) I won't feel my (heart!) I wish it wasn't like this! I wish it wasn't like this!
trackinfo.credits: from heat death of the universe, track released April 26, 2025

trackinfo.title: heat death of the universe
trackinfo.lyrics: The stars grow colder with every passing day I know it's coming to an end The love we once held has faded away I never wanted you to cry Now I know it's our time Now I know it's our time Now I know it's our time Now I know it's our time
trackinfo.credits: from heat death of the universe, released June 6, 2025

trackinfo.title: starfall on our lonely planet
trackinfo.lyrics: Watch the stars fall into our hands We will become a supernova Our essence is blue and orange All I can do is wail! You close your eyes, and succumb to the explosion I now see you etched in You close your eyes, and succumb to the explosion I now see you etched in You won't die! On my watch! You close your eyes, and succumb to the explosion I now see you etched in You close your eyes, and succumb to the explosion I now see you etched in You close your eyes, and succumb to the explosion (You close your eyes) I now see you etched in (Open your heart) You close your eyes, and succumb to the explosion (You close your eyes) I now see you etched in (Open your heart)
trackinfo.credits: from heat death of the universe, released June 6, 2025

trackinfo.title: exploding heart syndrome
trackinfo.lyrics: Close your heart (Your chest will soon explode!) Seeing me like this will hurt you Close your heart (Your chest will soon explode!) I'm nothing, without you You're as frail as a flower Made of steel, yet you're just wet paper!
trackinfo.credits: from heat death of the universe, released June 6, 2025

trackinfo.title: checkered arms
trackinfo.lyrics: Checkered arms We lay afraid "Keep me safe" Is what you'd say And so the sun Keeps on growing Keeps on going As you fade into a memory... (Scattered on your arms!) I saw the twinkle in your eyes fade (Stay on the phone!) We held hands in the summer twilight (Scattered on your arms!) We hold a blanket of blades (Stay on the phone!) There's a sadness un-wilting (Scattered on your arms!) I saw your message at 3 A.M. (Stay on the phone!) In the dead of night (Scattered on your arms!) Please keep on fighting (Stay on the phone!) I love you, Oh my god
trackinfo.credits: from heat death of the universe, released June 6, 2025

trackinfo.title: in my bones
trackinfo.lyrics: Did I wait too long? For you to change your mind? If we were older Would it have worked? Do you see, What I see? Are we destined, To repeat? In a scale, Am I  anything? I'm climbing, I"m climbing I feel it, I'm about to die I feel it, There's no more time I feel it, In my bones I feel it, I'm not going home
trackinfo.credits: from heat death of the universe, released June 6, 2025

trackinfo.title: It's You
trackinfo.lyrics: let go of this hold (i see myself!) in this wilting home please just tell us- what i did! it is my brave heart (ahhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh) let go, my hold (ahhhh) i'm done!
trackinfo.credits: from I See Myself In You, I Hate It., released February 7, 2024

trackinfo.title: And I Miss Pou
trackinfo.lyrics: you don't get a second chance (i feel your chest) i'm not coming back to you we're through! and i miss you and i miss you and i miss you why won't you come back? i know it's for the best and i miss you! (ahhhh) i want you to come back (for the best!) and i miss you, do you miss me too? i know it's for the best
trackinfo.credits: from I See Myself In You, I Hate It., released February 7, 2024

trackinfo.title: The Artwork On My Arms
trackinfo.lyrics: a million red lines each one holds a story i'm scared, that they'll come true i'm scared, they'll become part of you (you, part of you) we don't know how i can grow! these stupid scars! all over, my stupid arms! (they're the art of my sadness)  the pain never goes away this won't just fade

trackinfo.credits: from I See Myself In You, I Hate It., released February 7, 2024

trackinfo.title: I Fell Asleep With Your Stuffed Animal You Gave Me So I Could Feel Like You Were Next To Me Again
trackinfo.lyrics: I look back - I can’t find a reason, a reason I won’t know, what it is that you have found, While Idle I look back at the past 16 years of my life, I can’t find What I’m looking for Holding sweet bitter ends With your fainted goodbyes

Dead Butterflies.title: Ramona, The Hurt
Dead Butterflies.credits:
released June 14, 2024
Cover art by @kevtua on instagram
Crash Landing features vocals from Glowwworms
All other songwriting and recording done by Micah Z. & Stephen F.

trackinfo.title: Constellations
trackinfo.lyrics: Fragmented, I roam (is this what you want?) Butterfly eyes, they look at me cold (are you what you felt?) As if stone, as if stone (stone cold!) The constellation in your freckles, pull me to earth I look down at my home I won't go alone In space I roam stars! Cosmic Boom! I'm coming down! I am merely a fragment! I am merely a fragment! In space I roam stars In space I roam stars...
trackinfo.credits:
from Ramona, The Hurt, track released May 17, 2024
Artwork by @masheddoq on instagram
All writing and recording done by Micah and Stephen.

trackinfo.title: Leaves!
trackinfo.lyrics: Melancholy blooming Blossom into nothing! into nothing! You have left your mark On my heart! You have left your mark On my heart! I feel so disconnected from the leaves They fall just like I do Yet they come back! Yet They come back!
trackinfo.credits: from Ramona, The Hurt, released June 14, 2024

trackinfo.title: UIL State Champs
trackinfo.lyrics: The bug crawled My first instinct was to kill But I'm not sick of this I want you to live I want you to live Crush them in your palm (what have you done?) See the juice spread  Just for a moment of satisfaction, a life ends (what have you done?) Feel the (goodbye) Guilt that (goodbye) You felt (goodbye) You (goodbye) What have you done? (UIL State champs!) What have you done?(UIL State champs!)
trackinfo.credits: from Ramona, The Hurt, released June 14, 2024

trackinfo.title: Crash Landing!! (feat. Glowwworms)
trackinfo.lyrics: We were alone in my room when you showed me your scars! I had the most poetic dream, about who I was meant to be! (idk what glowwworms is saying) crash landing! I think we're done! I can't pull up! (i still dont know what glowwworms is saying) crash landing! I think we're done! I can't pull up!
trackinfo.credits:
from Ramona, The Hurt, released June 14, 2024
Features Glowwworms

trackinfo.title: Your Face, In Stone // Princess Broken Glass
trackinfo.lyrics: We stood there all alone (wake up, I am alone!) I saw your face, in stone Stone! *BADASS TRUMPET SOLO* Like stone! We Grow! Through the... Smoke! ///////////////////////////////////// I am alone! Why Wont You Love Me Too? I feel, so changed from my past I know you can't fix,  you can't fix broken glass
trackinfo.credits: from Ramona, The Hurt, released June 14, 2024

trackinfo.title: ily sm.
trackinfo.credits: from Ramona, The Hurt, released June 14, 2024

trackinfo.title: Starshine
trackinfo.lyrics: Your treehouse, where you broke your teeth Your treehouse, that I can't climb Your treehouse, lovers entwined On your roof, I won't find Us sitting there, us staring at the moon! Us looking the stars! I wish I could, I wish I could go back...
trackinfo.credits: from Ramona, The Hurt, released June 14, 2024

trackinfo.title: Homemade Bread
trackinfo.lyrics: Cut through facade! I want you to be gone! (gone!) I look down cars beneath me, (do I jump?) I look down cars beneath me, (do I jump?) I don't want to die (will I be like her?) I don't want to die (will I be like her?) Hold me back, I'll drown too! Let the embrace take me away! I don't want to live without you (I don't want to live without you) I don't want to live without you (I don't want to live without you)
trackinfo.credits: from Ramona, The Hurt, released June 14, 2024

trackinfo.title: ...For I Am The Waves
trackinfo.lyrics: Do you feel the weight crushing in? (for I am the waves!) I feel it too, I feel it too!  Do you feel the weight crushing in? (for I am the waves!) I feel it too, I feel it too!
trackinfo.credits: from Ramona, The Hurt, released June 14, 2024

Dead Butterflies.title: that feeling in your chest
Dead Butterflies.about: this ep is a collection of various b-sides from our 3rd album, "heat death of the universe"

trackinfo.title: solace in solitude
trackinfo.lyrics: i woke up, in the middle of the night facing the wall, which i look while i cried last night! i keep myself, to my own when i say "bye" leave me alone i don't want your help "i don't want your help too!" solace in solitude, i know you, i know you (find my) solace in solitude, i know you, i know you i want to be see you, meet you, i want to be you! i want to feel you, hold your hand as we feel the days fly past watch the sunset together! can we fly through the air like the feather? caught through the wind, the gust controlling bound together, i don't feel lowly! solace in solitude, i knew you, i miss you
trackinfo.about: a song about not being at peace with oneself.
trackinfo.credits: from that feeling in your chest, released December 24, 2024

trackinfo.title: paintings!
trackinfo.lyrics: i'm in love with a painting! i clutch onto your words, as if knives! you aren't real!
trackinfo.credits: from that feeling in your chest, released December 24, 2024

trackinfo.title: due to fear (ft. stella)
trackinfo.lyrics: I saw starlight, sparkle in your eyes, There is nothing left I feel like, someone who isn’t You live in the moment, you live in the present Rip my wings off! (x4) (I’m scared to fly! Stuck In starlight!) Now when I see the moon, I think of you. I acted due to fear, I acted due to fear Rip my wings off! (x4) (I’m scared to fly! Stuck In starlight!) I acted due to fear, I acted due to fear.
trackinfo.about: a song about hurting the ones you love.
trackinfo.credits: from that feeling in your chest, released December 24, 2024

trackinfo.title: embers
trackinfo.lyrics: i lay into my comfort, whispering into the dimly lit room: “i love you, i love you” faded colors of orange and yellow still haunt me i feel the twilight’s embers burn with every sweet intent, exerted as unbridled anger my chest is exploding, my chest is exploding leaving me screaming: “i love you! i love you!” (i love you!) Slammed in my wrist! These twisted stems! This new feeling won’t last! I beg, I beg for your hand! Your hand!  (why did i dare to love you?) why did I dare to love you! pouring out her chest, her sweet flowers lay wilted. she feels their pedals sink between her fingers, leaving nothing but dried carbon. “grab these lavender thorns and shove them into my wrists, maybe i’ll feel something different” she yells. her liquid runs across her skin, starving for more she continues to slam those twisted stems further into her arms. “oh god, oh god, oh god…” she repeats internally. wondering how long these newfound scars will take to blossom. little does she know, cutting through her own skin will find no flowers, yet she continues to wail. (i love you!) why did i dare to love you? (Slammed in my wrist!) (These twisted stems!) (This new feeling won’t last!) (I beg, I beg for your hand!) (Your hand!)
trackinfo.about: a song about wanting to love again.
trackinfo.credits: from that feeling in your chest, released December 24, 2024

trackinfo.title: wet paper (scrapped demo)
trackinfo.lyrics: oh, you're as fragile as a flower made of steel, and yet you're wet paper oh, you're crying behind the counter you hate your job, you hate your boss you aren't getting ill you're just growing out your shell we love you! i love you! i'm not giving up! you will grow up strong, oh in a field of arms, holding so tight we care! we care! we care!  we care, we care, we care, we care grasping onto to something that'll never support you, you plummet to the sea below. prepared to drown you loosen your muscles and close your eyes, your body slams into the water, causing you to plummet deep below the sea line. now you drown, i watch hopelessly i scream and i plead for some sort rescue, some sort of savior to come, i know that my efforts alone will be futile, i can choose an attempt to rescue you knowing its impossible leading to the death of us both. your body is already lifeless, your body is already lifeless, your lungs have collapsed and the skull is filling with water, i continue to scream i refuse to let you die, i jump in the water knowing my fate will be sealed in a near instant, for i cannot swim, you have already passed, and soon so will i. you are already gone. you aren't getting ill you're just growing out your shell in a field of arms, holding so tight we care! we care! we care!  we care, we care, we care, we care you will not die on my chest we care we care we care we care we care we care we care we care
trackinfo.credits: from that feeling in your chest, released December 24, 2024
